revision.text: {{#if: {{{noicon|{{{no-icon|}}}}}} | |{{#ifeq: {{{wstitle|}}} | |{{#ifeq: {{{1|}}}| |[[File:PD-icon.svg|12px|class=noviewer|alt=Public Domain]]  |[[File:Wikisource-logo.svg|12px|class=noviewer|alt=Wikisource]]  }} |[[File:Wikisource-logo.svg|12px|class=noviewer|link=|alt=]]  }} }}{{#ifeq: {{{no-prescript|{{{noprescript|}}}}}} | |{{#ifeq: {{{inline|{{{footnote|}}}}}} | |This article |One or more of the preceding sentences }} incorporates text from a publication now in the [[public domain]]:  }}{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=cite EB1911 |_exclude=footnote, inline, noicon, no-icon, noprescript, no-prescript, _debug | noicon=1 }}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACEE}} ||[[Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating text from the 1911 Encyclopædia Britannica]]}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
